song.title: Lifesong
song.author: Casting Crowns
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A F#m E D . A Empty hands held high . F#m Such small sacrifice . D If not joined with my life . Bm I sing in vain tonight . A F#m May the words I say and the things I do . E D Make my lifesong sing, bring a smile to You
[C] . A E F#m D Let my lifesong sing to You, let my lifesong sing to You . D E I wanna sign Your name to the end of this day . F#m D Knowing that my heart was true . Bm D A Let my lifesong sing to You
[V2] . A F#m Lord I give my life a living sacrifice . Bm To reach a world in need to be Your hands and feet . A F#m So may the words I say and the things I do . E D Make my lifesong sing, bring a smile to You
[B] . D A F#m E Hallelu_jah, Hallelu__jah . D E F#m E Let my lifesong sing to You
